title: Korean-Style Baked Potato
description: A simple and delicious recipe for a Korean-inspired baked potato. The spicy kick from the korean chili flakes pairs perfectly with the creamy texture of the potato.

ingredients.name: icy
ingredients.notes: Icy cold butter, cut into small pieces

instructions: Wash the potatoes thoroughly and poke some holes in each with a fork.
Rub the potatoes with a little bit of icy cold butter and sprinkle with Korean chili flakes.
Sprinkle a pinch of baking powder on top of each potato.
Place the potatoes directly on the middle rack of the oven.
Bake for 45-60 minutes, or until the potatoes are tender when pierced with a fork.
Remove the potatoes from the oven and let them cool for a few minutes.
Serve the potatoes hot, garnished with some additional Korean chili flakes if desired.
